events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! From astrophysics to stadium rock, his influence on music is simply astronomical.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Sir Mick.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first ever music video.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever. Remember the moment 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, propelling them to superstardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation and still sounds absolutely massive.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival of Music & Art kicked off on August 15, 1969, becoming a defining moment of the counterculture era.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The legend of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years on, the King's legacy is as strong as ever. Remembering Elvis Presley, whose music continues to captivate millions.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the music world tragically lost Tupac Shakur, who died on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a voice that changed hip-hop forever. Remembering the enduring impact of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose revolutionary guitar playing continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Crossing Paths
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs – an absolute masterpiece from start to finish.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude remain timeless.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 8, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the 'Imagine' album. Its message of peace and hope resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple launched a little device that changed music consumption forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to 64 years of 007 adventures and iconic theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the unparalleled talent and enduring message of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy icon John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python and star of Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is simply timeless.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles unveiled their ambitious 'White Album'. A sprawling, diverse masterpiece that still sparks debate.
